candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches target definition and has full series of values. Duplicates Total Revenue amounts, so use as first priority.
Also labeled as total revenue and numerically identical to Revenues; kept as secondary label in case of naming changes over time.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet item, not revenue.
Liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Both 'Revenues' and 'Total Revenue' represent the same top-line figure; providing both as a priority list for robustness across years.

candidates.why: Standard label for cost of goods sold / cost of sales, even though preview shows NaNs.
Explicitly labeled as COGS; also an appropriate choice.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Most explicit COGS description; preferred single mapping to avoid double counting.
Overhead/SG&A-type cost, not direct COGS in this context.
Overhead/SG&A-type operating expenses, not direct COGS.
Net operating line including multiple components; not a pure COGS line.
Financial expenses, not COGS.
Net financial result, not COGS.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense line.
Liability/accrual, not the expense itself.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: Chose the most explicit COGS label as a single mapping to avoid potential double counting with similarly labeled cost rows.

candidates.why: Clearly an operating overhead component (personnel); valid SG&A component but not needed if a single SG&A bucket is used.
Operating overhead bucket; also an SG&A component but can be subsumed by explicit SG&A line.
Explicit SG&A line with values present; per hierarchy, use this alone for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: An explicit populated SG&A line exists; per instructions it alone is used for XSGA_COMPONENTS.
No research & development-related line item appears in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews; XRD is treated as 0.

candidates.why: Aggregate interest and other financial expenses; good fallback if more specific interest expense lines are missing for some years.
Primary interest expense line; best match for recurring interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense specifically on lease liabilities; should be included as an alternative label for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest and Other Financial Expense rest
candidates.why: Residual interest/financial expense component; can serve as a lower-priority alternative.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental presentation of lease interest expense; relevant as an alternative label.
Balance sheet accrual, not the expense line itself.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Accrued interest liability, not the P&L expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
Interest and Other Financial Expense rest

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense labels, preferring the main 'Interest expenses' line, then lease-specific and supplemental interest, and finally broader aggregate interest expense buckets.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not a balance sheet equity stock.
Represents income attributable to equity holders, not the equity balance itself.
Component of shareholders' equity, not the full equity attributable to owners.
Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent; excludes non-controlling interests and is ideal for BE per instructions.
Includes non-controlling interests; only a fallback if parent equity were unavailable.

variables.notes: Uses equity attributable to shareholders of the parent, which excludes non-controlling interests as required for BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB.
Duplicate labeling of non-controlling interests; suitable but redundant with the primary choice.

variables.notes: Maps MIB to the balance sheet non-controlling interests line, excluding it from BE to avoid double counting.
